violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the deli. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Hand-washing soap was provided at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Per interview of staff, slicers are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Staff to wash, rinse, and sanitize deli slicers at least once every four hours. English Deli Slicer Cleaning and Sanitizing Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Per interview, staff wash deli utensils in the food prep sink. Equipment and utensils must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized in the 3-bay sink. English Warewashing and 3 Bay Sink Poster New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Several pre-packaged foods were observed lacking ingredients labels (tiramisu, cheese, chicken and pasta, ham and potatoes). Establishment printed labels for deli meals and pulled the tiramisu off of the self-service shelf at time of inspection. English Food Labeling for Packaged Food Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Clean deli utensils were observed stored from a wall hanger against a wall (touching) a wall with visible food debris. Utensils removed to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Wall to be clean before hanging cleaned utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
